title: hymenophyllum clavatum
intro: Hymenophyllum clavatum, also known as the clubbed scale fern, is a species of fern in the family Hymenophyllaceae. It is native to Australia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Hymenophyllum clavatum include treating various skin conditions, such as eczema and acne, as well as reducing inflammation and improving wound healing. The plant is typically prepared for herbal use by drying and making it into a tea or powder, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
